valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Wed 18 Feb 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Thu 19 Feb 2026
general_synopsis: Low 140 mile west of Rockall 986 expected Rockall 985 by 1800 Thursday. New low expected Plymouth 987 by same time. High 1017 northeast England dissipating by that time
